occurrence_sentence: Alice & Bob will partner with NVIDIA to accelerate the integration of quantum technology into industry by introducing cat qubits into the datacenters of the future.
Alice & Bob will partner with NVIDIA to accelerate the integration of quantum technology into industry by introducing cat qubits into the datacenters of the future.
Alice & Bob integrates NVIDIA DGX Quantum, which combines NVIDIA GH200 Grace Hopper Superchips and the Quantum Machines' OPX+ control system.

Alice & Bob integrates [NVIDIA DGX](https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/data-center/dgx-quantum/)[ Quantum](https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/data-center/dgx-quantum/), which combines [NVIDIA ](https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/data-center/grace-hopper-superchip/)[GH200 ](https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/data-center/grace-hopper-superchip/)[Grace Hopper](https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/data-center/grace-hopper-superchip/)[ Superchips](https://www.nvidia.com/en-us/data-center/grace-hopper-superchip/) and the Quantum Machines' OPX+ control system.

Alice & Bob are also using [NVIDIA CUDA](https://developer.nvidia.com/cuda-quantum)[ Quantum](https://developer.nvidia.com/cuda-quantum), an open-source platform for integrating and programming quantum processing units (QPUs), GPUs, and CPUs in one system, to enable real-time decoding of complex error correction codes, such as qLDPC, which are the core of Alice & Bob's roadmap.

The integration of NVIDIA's technology and expertise in application-specific, high-performance computational tasks in the datacenter is set to help us in our journey towards making quantum useful for businesses, says Théau Peronnin, Alice & Bob's CEO.

interaction_phrase: integration of Alice and Bob's technology with NVIDIA DGX Quantum
occurrence_sentence: "The integration of Alice and Bob's technology with NVIDIA DGX Quantum is set to help open the door to real-time error correction — an essential step on the road to useful quantum computing," says Tim Costa, director of HPC and quantum at NVIDIA.
"This gives our integration in the launch of NVIDIA Quantum Cloud its deeper meaning."

occurrence_sentence: The integration of Alice and Bob's technology with NVIDIA DGX Quantum is set to help open the door to real-time error correction — an essential step on the road to useful quantum computing,
